author: Rayvven
description: A Pinterest-style vertical scrolling board for the images and videos in a folder. Point it at a folder, scroll, and optionally attach a note to any pin. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Rayvven
manifest.description: A Pinterest-style vertical scrolling board for the images and videos in a folder. Point it at a folder, scroll, and optionally attach a note to any pin.
manifest.name: Pin Board

name: Pin Board

releases.author: Rayvven
releases.description:
## What's new
- **Move a pin to another board.** Right-click any pin → **Move to another board…**, pick a folder, and the pin (with its caption note) is copied there. You're then asked whether to keep a copy in the old board too or remove it. Anything removed goes to trash, so it's recoverable.
## Fixes
- **Fixed the top bar gap.** The folder dropdown / "All pins" / pin-count bar now sits flush against the top of the board — no more slivers of pictures peeking through above it while scrolling.
